_expected.note: Initial state already places two pods of the same antiAffinity-enabled deployment on the same node, so the violation fires on s0 before any action runs. The Lean model has no scheduler/spawn action that could create this situation mid-trajectory; this fixture demonstrates the verifier catching an unsafe initial cluster. PDB (minAvailable=1, 2 Running) and capacity (each node fits both pods) are fine, so invariantsClosed = 3 - 1 = 2 and prefixLength = 0.
